title: Pair-a-Dice Pets
short_description: Study the pets on the shelf, then answer: which one vanished, which snuck in, how many were there?
description: The pets at the Pair-a-Dice Pet Shop love to play tricks! Study the pets on the shelf while the clock ticks down, and when they hide, remember what you saw. Then answer the challenge: which pet vanished, which sneaky newcomer snuck in, how many pets were there, or which pet was in a certain spot? It's a Kim's-game style memory workout that trains observation, visual memory and attention. Younger players get fewer pets and a longer look; older players face a crowded shelf and only a quick peek. A free online memory and observation brain-training game for kids in grades 1–5, with speed and streak bonuses feeding your score and GP.
controls: Watch the shelf, then mouse / tap the pet (or number) that answers the challenge.
